nasb.text: For You said, ‘I will surely prosper you and make your descendants as the sand of the sea, which is too great to be numbered.’ ”

esv.text: But you said, ‘I will surely do you good, and make your offspring as the sand of the sea, which cannot be numbered for multitude.’”

cnv.text: 你曾經說過：‘我必厚待你，使你的後裔好像海邊的沙一樣，多到不可勝數。’”

ccb.text: 然而，你曾说，‘我必厚待你，使你的后代多如海沙，不可胜数。’”

csbs.text: 但你说过：‘我必定厚待你，使你的后裔如同海边的沙粒，多得无法数清。’”
